steps.t: Make your way to Raphûz in the shadow of Telperiën's Wall and ask the young man why he is sullen.
Raphûz confessed to dropping his pack while investigating something he saw in the distance while travelling with the caravan. He asked you to follow t…
You found the location Raphûz described where he lost his pack and noticed what looked like a person watching you to the north-west. You should invest…
You saw something to the north-west and went to investigate. When you arrived you did not find a person. You did, however, find a pack.
You took the pack from the ground and made certain it was Raphûz's. You can find no signs that anyone was standing here a moment ago. Return the pack …
Raphûz is grateful to you for returning his pack. He asks you to go to Kizeri and tell her that you helped him as she asked.
